summary: Iteration 127: Testing Accepted Preventivi on Planning Board. All 10 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: preventivo cards with dashed green border, 'Preventivo Accettato' badge, correct header counts, navigation to preventivo editor on click, non-draggable behavior. Found and fixed BUG: double 'prev_' prefix in commessa_id.

board_view_returns_accepted_preventivi.result: PASS - Returns accepted preventivi in 'preventivo' column with is_preventivo: true

preventivo_item_structure.result: PASS - All required fields present, commessa_id equals preventivo_id (both have prev_ prefix)

linked_preventivi_not_duplicated.test: Preventivi with linked commessa don't appear as separate board items
linked_preventivi_not_duplicated.result: PASS - No overlap between board preventivi and linked preventivi

create_and_verify_preventivo.flow: Create preventivo → Update status to 'accettato' → Verify appears on board
create_and_verify_preventivo.result: PASS - New accepted preventivi correctly appear on the board

only_accettato_status_shown.test: Only preventivi with status='accettato' appear on board
only_accettato_status_shown.result: PASS - All board preventivi have 'accettato' status

preventivo_cards_not_draggable.frontend_test: Preventivo cards have no drag handle, commessa cards do
preventivo_cards_not_draggable.result: PASS - Preventivo cards don't have cursor-grab class

preventivo_card_styling.result: PASS - Dashed green border and badge displayed

header_shows_counts.result: PASS - Header shows both commesse and preventivi counts

drag_ignored_for_prev_ids.result: PASS - Drag operations silently ignored for prev_ prefixed IDs

double_prev_prefix.issue: commessa_id was being set to f"prev_{prev['preventivo_id']}" but preventivo_id already has 'prev_' prefix

critical_code_review_comments: Backend commesse.py: Clean implementation of board view with accepted preventivi filtering (lines 299-359)
Frontend PlanningPage.js: PreventivoCard component correctly styled with no Draggable wrapper
Header counts correctly separate commesse from preventivi (lines 119-120)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test preventivo during integration test
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Planning Board now shows accepted preventivi (status='accettato') without linked commesse in the 'Nuove Commesse' column. These have: dashed green border styling, 'Preventivo Accettato' badge, non-draggable behavior, click navigation to /preventivi/edit/{id}. The commessa_id for these items equals their preventivo_id (both have 'prev_' prefix). 8 accepted preventivi currently on board, 3 regular commesse in other columns.
